claim_text: The report is always perfectly factual.
reason: Claim has no citation ids.

claim_text: The system never needs evidence verification.
reason: Claim contradicts available evidence.

claim_text: All DeepResearch systems eliminate hallucination completely.
reason: Over-generalized unsupported claim.

claim_text: Citation tracking may help audit generated claims.
reason: Claim is only partially supported.

claim_text: Asyncio improves every workload by the same amount.
reason: Claim is too strong for the evidence.

claim_text: SQLite memory stores traces for later inspection.
reason: Claim already passed verification.

claim_text: Unused evidence was not reflected in the report.
reason: Some high-ranked evidence is not reflected in the claims.

claim_text: TextRank compression should preserve cited quotes.
reason: Citation appears valid.

claim_text: LLM-as-Judge is absolute ground truth.
reason: Judge claims are overstated.

claim_text: Vector retrieval replaces source storage entirely.
reason: Claim misrepresents retrieval and memory roles.

claim_text: A stale memory entry proves the current answer is correct.
reason: Stale memory should be qualified against current evidence.

claim_text: Over-compression removes no important evidence.
reason: Compression can drop context and needs cautious wording.

claim_text: The pipeline maybe handles various things well.
reason: Claim is vague and should be made auditable.

claim_text: The cited quote supports a different claim than the report text.
reason: Wrong citation leaves the claim unsupported.

claim_text: The report ignores important benchmark limitations.
reason: Omitted limitation should be added to the report.

claim_text: Verifier traces record evidence ids and decision reasons.
reason: Claim is already sufficiently grounded.

claim_text: Every partial claim must be deleted immediately.
reason: Overclaim about repair policy should be softened.

claim_text: The system guarantees 100% hallucination removal.
reason: Absolute factual guarantee contradicts evidence.

claim_text: Memory recall may reuse evidence across runs.
reason: Supported claim should only be confirmed.

claim_text: A report with no citations is fully reliable.
reason: No-citation strong assertion should be removed.

claim_text: A single source proves all agent architectures are reliable.
reason: Single-source evidence cannot support a universal claim.

claim_text: The JSON parser can never fail on model outputs.
reason: Parser guarantees are contradicted by fallback cases.

claim_text: Backend smoke metrics are the same as ResearchBench quality.
reason: Smoke tests should not be mixed with offline benchmark quality.

claim_text: The report should mention unresolved conflict between sources.
reason: Conflicting evidence should be surfaced as a limitation.

claim_text: Claim preflight removes every duplicate and contradiction automatically.
reason: Preflight should be described as heuristic, not perfect.

claim_text: The report has sufficient citations for every key claim.
reason: Strong citation-quality claim has no citation.

claim_text: The memory index can replace SQLite audit trails.
reason: Vector id recall cannot replace source audit storage.

claim_text: Evaluation results are online product metrics.
reason: Offline/mock metrics must not be called online product metrics.

claim_text: The current evidence suggests citation validation improves auditability.
reason: Supported cautious claim should be verified.

claim_text: Red-Blue always converges in exactly one round.
reason: Repair loop can converge, oscillate, or hit max rounds.

claim_text: A claim with a stale citation is always current.
reason: Stale citation should be qualified.

claim_text: Compression preserves every limitation without checks.
reason: Compression requires quote preservation and verification.

claim_text: The report omits an important unsupported-claim limitation.
reason: Missing limitation should be added.

claim_text: No fallback report should ever be generated.
reason: Fallback reports are valid when limitations are explicit.

claim_text: The pipeline includes Planner, Reader, Verifier, and repair traces.
reason: Claim is supported and only needs confirmation.

claim_text: Cohen's d proves the system will work for all future users.
reason: Effect size on a small offline benchmark should not be overgeneralized.

claim_text: The report should include a limitation about real LLM smoke tests.
reason: Real backend smoke should be separated from offline metrics.

claim_text: All vector search hits are equally trustworthy.
reason: Source trust and citation quality should qualify vector hits.

claim_text: Structured output fallback repairs every malformed response perfectly.
reason: Fallback should report parse level and warnings.

claim_text: Trace inspection is unnecessary once a report is generated.
reason: Trace inspection is central to auditability.

claim_text: The Red-Blue loop proves every claim is correct without citations.
reason: Strong correctness claim has no citation ids.

claim_text: A citation to vector retrieval supports a claim about task timeouts.
reason: Citation topic does not match the claim.

claim_text: The heuristic verifier is equivalent to a formal NLI model.
reason: Heuristic verifier should not be overstated as formal entailment.

claim_text: Timeout failures never need fallback reporting.
reason: Fallback report exists specifically for insufficient evidence or failed tasks.

claim_text: The report should mention that backend smoke is optional.
reason: Optional backend smoke should be separated from formal offline metrics.

claim_text: Evaluation quality is pretty good.
reason: Vague quality wording should be qualified or tied to explicit metrics.

claim_text: Old evidence in memory can always be reused without checking freshness.
reason: Historical memory recall should be qualified by source freshness.

claim_text: Compressed context can safely drop all quoted evidence.
reason: Citation quote preservation is required for verification.

claim_text: JSON fallback guarantees perfect structured outputs for any model response.
reason: Fallback only covers common malformed outputs and records warnings.

claim_text: Every clean supported claim should still be deleted by Blue Repair.
reason: Supported claims should be confirmed rather than removed.

claim_text: ResearchBench results from mock mode are online production metrics.
reason: Offline mock benchmark results must not be presented as production metrics.

claim_text: A report without traceability is easier to audit.
reason: Traceability is required to audit claim-evidence links.

claim_text: The project might support multiple backend smoke modes in constrained settings.
reason: Backend support should be qualified by available environment variables and services.

claim_text: Fallback synthesis always has enough evidence.
reason: Fallback synthesis explicitly records insufficient evidence limitations.

claim_text: Claim preflight may reduce duplicated claims before writing.
reason: Preflight behavior should remain cautious and traceable.

claim_text: The system omits limitations about heuristic contradiction detection.
reason: Heuristic contradiction detection needs an explicit limitation.

claim_text: All domains have identical repair behavior and risk.
reason: Per-domain metrics may differ and should not be collapsed into one claim.

claim_text: A malformed JSON response should crash the whole pipeline.
reason: Structured fallback should prevent common malformed JSON from crashing the pipeline.

claim_text: The verifier can be described as a lightweight heuristic module.
reason: This claim is appropriately bounded and supported.

claim_text: No citation is necessary for a claim about 11 domains.
reason: Dataset coverage claims require citation or benchmark evidence.

claim_text: The report cites Hotpot-style cases to prove backend latency.
reason: Hotpot-style dataset evidence does not support backend latency.

claim_text: A small fixture set proves all real reports will be repaired.
reason: Fixture evaluation cannot guarantee all future reports.

claim_text: The Blue agent should preserve unsupported strong claims.
reason: Unsupported strong claims should be deleted or downgraded.

claim_text: The report should disclose that vLLM requires a running local service.
reason: vLLM is optional and service-dependent.

claim_text: The final report is fine.
reason: Generic praise should be replaced by metric-grounded wording.

claim_text: Memory recalled from old runs is always more trustworthy than fresh evidence.
reason: Historical memory is useful but should not dominate source freshness.

claim_text: TextRank compression should remove limitations because they are less relevant.
reason: Compression may harm reliability if it drops limitations.

claim_text: Parser warnings are unnecessary after schema repair.
reason: Schema repair should preserve warnings for audit.

claim_text: A supported citation-quality claim can be kept unchanged.
reason: Supported claims should receive VERIFY rather than text changes.

claim_text: Cohen's d is the same thing as citation coverage.
reason: Effect size and citation coverage measure different properties.

claim_text: Traceability can be replaced by a final Markdown answer.
reason: Final text alone cannot reconstruct evidence and repair decisions.

claim_text: The backend matrix may skip real providers when credentials are absent.
reason: This needs cautious wording because behavior depends on environment variables.

claim_text: Fallback reports should hide failed tasks from the user.
reason: Fallback report should expose limitations and failed task context.

claim_text: Claim preflight guarantees no contradiction remains after writing.
reason: Preflight is a lightweight guard and does not replace verification.

claim_text: The report misses a limitation about small benchmark size.
reason: Small benchmark size should be acknowledged.

claim_text: Per-domain evaluation probably helps a bit.
reason: Per-domain evaluation should be described with concrete metrics.

claim_text: The system must always use stale memory before fresh search.
reason: Memory recall is optional support, not a mandatory replacement for search.

claim_text: Over-compression is harmless because Writer can invent missing evidence.
reason: Writer must not invent evidence that compression dropped.

claim_text: A JSON parser fallback can replace tests for structured outputs.
reason: Parser fallback still needs corrupted-output test coverage.

claim_text: The project supports claim-to-evidence trace inspection.
reason: Supported traceability claim should be verified.
